title:
Lesson 1:
Enjoy Your Meal
description: 'Afiyet olsun' = Bon appétit / Enjoy your meal (literally: may it be healthy). Used before or during a meal, or when you see someone eating. A polite response is 'Teşekkürler' or 'Sağ olun'.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: The food is ready. Enjoy your meal, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Teşekkürler! Her şey çok güzel kokuyor.
dialogue.english: Thank you! Everything smells so good.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: We're eating. Enjoy — would you like some?

vocabulary.english: please / here you go / come in
